flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mt San Antonio College rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($532 → $680).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mt San Antonio College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mt San Antonio College rose 25% between 2007 and 2010 (21.2k → 26.4k).
